title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Donate to the Philippine National Police Municipal Station Two (2) Units of Desktop Computers Purchased by the Municipal Government in Support to the Agency at Forty Thousand Pesos (P40,000.00) Each , Totaling to Eighty Thousand Pesos (P 80,000.00) and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 02/22/2021)
